title: Evangelion Groundworks
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Groundworks             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri May 27, 2016 5:20 pm Are they out of print now? I'm hearing that even the Rebuild Groundworks are unavailable now.

[]: Re: Evangelion Groundworks             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri May 27, 2016 5:28 pm CDJapan still lists all the Rebuild Groundwork books as available, but only vol 2 of the three for the series and vol 1 of the two for EoE . (Groundwork of FLCL has gone, too.)

[]: Re: Evangelion Groundworks             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri May 27, 2016 5:32 pm Drat! I was looking for EoE Vol 2. eBay and Amazon it is, then.
